creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
This is your sign to visit a Latin inspired restaurant in London ✨ @tigermilkuk

Enjoy the warm flavours of South America, fresh produce, and seasonal cuisine, all served in a stunning, cosy setting with a surprisingly affordable menu👨‍🍳

From the menu, we tried:
🥑 Starters: Guacamole, Salmon Tiradito £10.90 (my favourite 😍), and Sweet & Creamy Tacos (£7)
🍽️ Mains: The Portobello Quesadilla with a triple cheese blend (£16.90), and Cauli Me Maybe (a charred, marinated cauliflower steak £17.50)
🍰 Dessert: Don’t miss the delicious Dulce de Leche Cheesecake (£8.50)
🍹 Drinks: Tiger-Spritz and Pina Virgina

📍 Tigermilk, 127 Charing Cross Road (just minutes away from Tottenham Court Road Station)
